flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at University of Toledo vs the 2018–2022 baseline (10.2k vs 13.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Toledo fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (12.0k → 9.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Toledo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Toledo rose 32% between 2006 and 2009 (17.2% → 22.8%).
